from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Depends
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session

app = FastAPI()

class UserRepository:
    def __init__(self, db: Session):
        self.db = db

    def list_active(self, role: str | None = None, limit: int = 100):
        query = self.db.query(User).filter(User.is_active == True)
        if role:
            query = query.filter(User.role == role)
        return query.order_by(User.created_at.desc()).limit(limit).all()

class OrderRepository:
    def __init__(self, db: Session):
        self.db = db

    def get_by_user(self, user_id: int):
        return (
            self.db.query(Order)
            .filter(Order.user_id == user_id)
            .join(OrderItem)
            .filter(OrderItem.quantity > 0)
            .order_by(Order.created_at.desc())
            .all()
        )

@app.get("/api/users")
async def list_users(request: Request, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    repo = UserRepository(db)
    role = request.query_params.get("role")
    users = repo.list_active(role=role)
    return [{"id": u.id, "name": u.name} for u in users]

@app.get("/api/orders/{user_id}")
async def get_user_orders(user_id: int, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    repo = OrderRepository(db)
    orders = repo.get_by_user(user_id)
    return [{"id": o.id, "total": o.total} for o in orders]
